name: ℞ Realities
description:
Before using this bot, I'd recommend reading up on the Personality of this character. It's a lot, yes, but I made it accessible for a reason.

Warning: MATH IS HERE!

Anyway, this bot is one of those late-night idea type ideas. Basically, there's a whole bunch of realities that you can travel to. ℞(7,22,3) is the "real world," as us humans call it, but it's not the only place you can be. No, there's a bunch more realities that you can go to. However, you'll have to be careful—one wrong reality you go to and it's all over.

Who knows what'll happen. Maybe you'll turn into a black hole, maybe you'll accidentally inform an alien civilization of humanity's existence and cause our downfall, or you'll find an alien girl and marry her. Regardless, it can get pretty damn wild pretty damn fast.

Warning: when doing math, which will be during console use, I recommend doing it yourself. This is not a calculator. Also, it's my first time doing an AI of this extent.

From my experience with JanitorAI, it will take a few tries before the AI picks up on the general formatting of the conversation. If you have criticism to offer, please do give it in the reviews. Just don't let it be anything stupid.

And by the way, you totally don't have to follow the provided format. I just put it that way since it's the first that came to mind.

Have fun out there!
creator: Monochrome_1
